shlex/shlex/commenters.name: commenters
shlex/shlex/commenters.description: The string of characters that are recognized as comment beginners. All characters from the comment beginner to end of line are ignored. Includes just '#' by default.

info.excerpt: The string of characters that are recognized as comment beginners. All characters from the comment beginner to end of line are ignored. Includes just '#' by default.
